source: UCLA Environmental Health & Safety (EH&S) AED Registry
url_reference: https://map.ucla.edu/ — search 'AED'; UCLA publishes AED locations on the campus map application
verification_method: Building centroids verified via OpenStreetMap building footprints (Overpass API, April 2026). AED placement within buildings based on UCLA EH&S general guidance (lobby/main entrance). Exact wall positions are approximate.

aeds.name: Royce Hall — Main Lobby
